phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Hostal dos Reis Católicos entrance is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la entrada del Hostal dos Reis Católicos?
phrases.pronunciation: DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEHL oh-STAHL DOHS REH-ees kah-TÓ-lee-kohs

likely_response.local: Junto a la Catedral, puerta norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL poo-EHR-tah NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the Cathedral, north door.

responses.english: Next to the Cathedral, north door.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL poo-EHR-tah NOHR-teh
responses.french: Junto a la Catedral, puerta norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cathedral entrance queue starts
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde comienza la fila para entrar a la catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: DON-deh koh-MYEHN-sah lah FEE-lah pah-rah en-TRAHR ah lah kah-teh-DRAHL?

likely_response.local: Junto a la fachada principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH fahth-AH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the main facade, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the main facade, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH fahth-AH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la fachada principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the tourist information point
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la oficina de turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah oh-fee-SEE-nah deh too-REEZ-moh?

likely_response.local: En el edificio del Hostal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh DEHL oh-STAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the Hostal building, on the left.

responses.english: In the Hostal building, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh DEHL oh-STAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En el edificio del Hostal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where pilgrims traditionally gather to celebrate finishing the Camino
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se reúnen los peregrinos al terminar el Camino?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh seh reh-OO-nen lohs peh-reh-GREE-nohs al tehr-mee-NAHR el kah-MEE-noh?

likely_response.local: En esta plaza, frente a la catedral.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EH-stah PLAH-thah FREHN-teh AH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: In this square, in front of the cathedral.

responses.english: In this square, in front of the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: EHN EH-stah PLAH-thah FREHN-teh AH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL
responses.french: En esta plaza, frente a la catedral.
